<hr style="height:0pt; visibility:hidden;" />

# basedpyright

Community fork of pyright with extra checks.

```{python}
#| echo: false
# Import required packages
import subprocess
import sys

# Add parent directory to sys.path
sys.path.insert(0, "..")

# Import the helper functions
from helpers import generate_html, print_quarto
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_html(
    pypi_url="https://pypi.org/project/basedpyright/",
    github_url="https://github.com/DetachHead/basedpyright",
    conda_url="https://anaconda.org/conda-forge/basedpyright"
)
```

## Example Quarto `.qmd` file:

{{< downloadthis examples/typecheck_example.qmd dname="typecheck_example" label="Download the example" type="light" >}}

:::{.pale-grey}
```{python}
#| echo: false
print_quarto("examples/typecheck_example.qmd")
```
:::

## Run basedpyright using `lintquarto`

```{.bash}
lintquarto -l basedpyright -p typecheck_example.qmd
```

:::{.pale-green}
<style>
.cell-output-stdout code {
  word-break: break-word !important;
  white-space: pre-wrap !important;
}
</style>
```{python}
#| echo: false
result = subprocess.run(
    [
        sys.executable,
        "-m",
        "lintquarto",
        "-l",
        "basedpyright",
        "-p",
        "examples/typecheck_example.qmd"
    ],
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
    check=False
)
print(result.stdout)
```
:::
